parameters.name: text_filter

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp in milliseconds

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp in milliseconds

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Range is: [1, 1000]

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Continue scrolling from cursor

get.summary: Get a forum post by id

Returns a private messages conversations based on filters

parameters.name: text_filter
parameters.description: Apply text filter to search for private messages based on a keyword.

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: Search for messages authored by given actor user name.

parameters.name: author_id
parameters.description: Search for messages authored by given actor id.

parameters.name: forum_title
parameters.description: Search for messages in a given forum

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Search text in subjects of Private Messages.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Search messages received by given actor user name.

parameters.name: recipient_id
parameters.description: Search messages received by given actor id.

parameters.name: forum_id
parameters.description: Search for messages in a given forum by `forum_id`. `forum_id` will take precedence if used together with the `forum_title` filter

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp(in milliseconds)

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: UNIX timestamp(in milliseconds)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Range is: [1, 1000]

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Continue scrolling from cursor

Activity.description: Activity information related to the entity

first_seen_ts.description: First time the entity was seen

last_seen_ts.description: Last time the entity was seen

creation_ts.description: Timestamp when the message was published first time

count.description: Total count of matched message entities

cursor_next.description: Stream position identifier to continue scrolling from

messages.description: A page of matched message entities

download_url.description: API url for download file listing

attachments.description: Attachments and images in the post

creation_ts.description: First scraping date in ISO 8601 format

inactive_since.description: The date post became inactive or was reactivated again in ISO 8601 format

count.description: Total count of matched post entities

cursor_next.description: Stream position identifier to continue scrolling from

posts.description: A page of matched post entities with nested thread and website

count.description: Total count of matched post entities

private_messages.description: A page of matched private message entities

attachments.description: Attachments and images in the post

creation_ts.description: First scraping date in ISO 8601 format

translated_subject.description: Contains translated message subject if available

message_count.description: Number of messages in the room
